positive: Minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl is depicted with stylized, graphic geometry and flowing feathers, radiating wisdom. Surround the owl with stylized constellations, abstract stardust trails, and geometric celestial bodies like ringed Saturn and Jupiter. Use a monochromatic palette of deep indigo, glowing cyan, and crisp white accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing clean negative space and powerful silhouettes, making it ideal for apparel screen printing. Art deco style, flat graphic design, strong outlines, vector art, digital illustration, maximal symmetry, crisp lines, isolated subject.
